creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 244356
signed-off .patch

The note box: 

> Git is generally a developer tool. Users may prefer to use … git …

Looking ahead, after bug 255323 is fixed: 

- gitup might be shown here as a preferred (and Handbook-documented)
  alternative to Git. 

For now (the patch): 

- reword the sentence, to not imply that Git is an alternative to Git.
